input.tenant_message: I was moving some boxes in my closet and found a bundle of wires coming out of the wall with no cover plate. Some of the wire insulation looks stripped and the copper is visible. I have a young kid so this is really dangerous. I've blocked off the closet for now.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch a licensed electrician immediately to secure and properly terminate the exposed wiring. Bare copper conductors accessible to occupants — especially children — pose an immediate electrocution hazard. The circuit feeding those wires should be shut off at the breaker until an electrician can install a proper junction box and cover plate.
